ValidationRule.description: Restricts users from moving past LOI Signature status until LOI Approval has reached 100%.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c), "LOI Signed"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "LOI Signed")), NOT( OR( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "ADM Approval"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "LOI"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "LOI in works"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "IC Approval"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "Termsheet Signed"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "Mandated"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "Termsheet Sent"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "Termsheet Drafting"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "CCO Sign Off"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "Novation - ADM Approval"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, "Pipeline") ) ), pro_LOI_Approval__c != 1 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: LOI Approval must reach 100% before the Deal Status can move past LOI Signature.
